scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @life-os/shared && npm run typecheck -w @life-os/ai && npm run typecheck -w @life-os/database && npm run typecheck -w @life-os/hermes && npm run typecheck -w @life-os/api && npm run typecheck -w @life-os/worker && npm run typecheck -w @life-os/web
scripts.build: npm run build -w @life-os/shared && npm run build -w @life-os/ai && npm run build -w @life-os/database && npm run build -w @life-os/hermes && npm run build -w @life-os/api && npm run build -w @life-os/worker && npm run build -w @life-os/web
